headline: Assessing Principal Financial Group (PFG) Valuation After Mixed Recent Returns And A 35.97% One-Year Gain
summary: What recent performance says about Principal Financial Group Principal Financial Group (PFG) has seen a mixed return profile recently, with a small 1 day decline and a slight gain over the past week, while the stock was modestly weaker over the past month. Over the past 3 months the move has been relatively flat, and the year to date total return sits in positive territory. Over the past year, 3 years, and 5 years, total returns are also positive, providing a sense of how the stock has...
